Violent Night (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $50,057,405Details
International Box Office $26,542,572
Worldwide Box Office $76,599,977
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,482,767
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,431,664
Total $4,914,431
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When a team of mercenaries breaks into a wealthy family compound on Christmas Eve, taking everyone inside hostage, the team isn’t prepared for a surprise combatant: Santa Claus is on the grounds, and he’s about to show why this Nick is no saint.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$13,450,240 (26.9% of total gross)
Legs:3.72 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:65.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,682 opening theaters/3,723 max. theaters, 5.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $56,715,755

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 2nd, 2022 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: November 30th, 2022 (Wide) (Egypt)
November 30th, 2022 (Wide) (Belgium)
November 30th, 2022 (Wide) (Philippines)
November 30th, 2022 (Wide) (Indonesia)
November 30th, 2022 (Wide) (Switzerland)
Video Release: January 20th, 2023 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong bloody violence, language throughout and some sexual references.
(Rating bulletin 2741 (cert #53925), 7/20/2022)
Running Time: 112 minutes
Plot point: Santa Claus
Social setting: Christmas

Production Method:Live Action

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

When a team of mercenaries breaks into a wealthy family compound on Christmas Eve, taking everyone inside hostage, the team isn’t prepared for a surprise combatant: Santa Claus is on the grounds, and he’s about to show why this Nick is no saint.
